About Me

Aryan
Iyer

I'm Aryan Iyer. I am a student from AAFT, Noida doing a course in animation. I want to be an Animator and Artist passionate about turning raw imagination into compelling visual experiences. I am learning frame-by-frame 2D animation and work at the intersection of story and motion — crafting work that resonates emotionally and lingers visually.

Skills & Tools
Adobe Animate After Effects Photoshop Illustrator Premeire Pro
